verify_email_subtitle: We sent a verification code to {{maskedEmail}}
verify_totp_subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app
error_invalid_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
setup_subtitle: Your organization requires two-factor authentication. Choose a method to secure your account.
setup_scan_instructions: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.) and scan this QR code.
manual_entry_label: Can't scan? Enter this code manually:
setup_enter_code_instructions: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.
recovery_codes_warning: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once. If you lose access to your authenticator, you can use a recovery code to sign in.
